query:
SELECT city, partnerFeeRate, description, isActive 
FROM cityPartnerConfig 
WHERE city IN ('宁波', '无锡', '天津')
ORDER BY city;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT city, partnerFeeRate, description, isActive 
FROM cityPartnerConfig 
WHERE city IN ('宁波', '无锡', '天津')
ORDER BY city;
